extra.reason: Fixed in 24feb13: _norm_file_key normalizes both query + stored keys at the inspect_file query boundary. 2 bug-A tests green, 145 passed no regressions. Retrieve test split to bead w2b (xfail).

Fixed in 278a765: description rewritten to name architecture/hygiene/layering + all 6 rules; added counts (by_rule, by_production) computed pre-truncation; added production_only filter reusing PERIPHERAL_ORGANS+_rel. 3 tests green (incl. pink-edge equivalence), 207 passed no regressions.
Deduped in 686bb5e (merged to main): _XREF_SQL was byte-identical to _DEP_EDGE_SQL; web/queries.py now imports the single SSOT. test_web 10 passed.

Merged 1a4b41d (f33ab8c): architecture_config.py + analyze(arch_config=) seam, layer_violation rule, backward-compat preserved. pyyaml added to pyproject deps. Config is optional per-repo override per user decision.
Merged 1a4b41d (d7946e0): explain_edge pure fn + code_graph_explain_edge tool, thin wrapper over is_deep_import.
Merged (244c2a2): HotspotInfo internal_refs/external_refs + file-level context fields; _enrich_hotspot reuses PERIPHERAL_ORGANS; include_tests opt-in. 336 passed.
Merged (3cde2db): detect_communities granularity=file via _file_projection, excludes externals, returns modularity, dominant-organ labels; symbol mode unchanged (test_communities 10/10).
Merged (7d73078): retrieve resolves filename/basename via _resolve_by_file_path + fallbacks mirror; ambiguous returns candidates.
Merged (ad84362): edge direction reclassified against resolved node_id, not query slot. Behavioral note: nodes hitting node_edges fallback now show correct (fewer) directional edges.
Merged (77517fa): limit/offset/summary_only/include_edges on hotspots/architecture/inspect + schema_version on 4 outputs + total/has_more.

Merged (9e7d9a7): dependency_matrix + MatrixNode/MatrixEdge in architecture.py reusing _DEP_EDGE_SQL SSOT; read_dependency_matrix store wrapper; code_graph_get_dependency_matrix tool with group_by file/dir/module; violation_count==is_deep_import. Matrix tests flipped xfail->green. 357 passed.

Merged (6652cef): code_graph_audit_public_surfaces reading _DEP_EDGE_SQL + ArchitectureConfig.public_surfaces; via-surface vs deep-import, unused exports, high-fan-in internals, all-exporting-barrel flag; clear message when no config. 361 passed. KNOWN LIMITATION: via-surface/deep-import split is Python-shaped (uses IMPORTS_SYMBOL from_module); TS falls back to treating dep-edge consumers as deep — follow-up bead filed.

TS via-surface/deep-import split: added _resolve_ts_specifier (relative/bare specifier -> repo file, honoring index.<ext> barrels) at handler edge; core name_to_file now also keyed by file path so resolved TS targets match. RED->GREEN TS fixture in test_public_surfaces.py (barrel index.ts). 70 passed.
